Insight: Pricing is the #1 weakness (3.86 avg stars, 108 mentions). Customers feel value is not commensurate with cost.
Action: Introduce a visible "value menu" or lunch special. Add portion size indicators on menu to set expectations.

Insight: Las Catalinas Google rating (4.16★) is significantly lower than TripAdvisor (4.77★), suggesting service inconsistency on-location vs curated reviews.
Action: Audit Las Catalinas staff training. Mystery diner visit recommended. Focus on friendliness and attentiveness.

Insight: Slow Service has 3.77 avg stars (22 mentions). Wait time complaints correlate with negative reviews across all locations.
Action: Implement kitchen timing targets. Add table pagers or SMS notification for large orders. Review peak-hour staffing.

Insight: Rohrmoser Google (4.23★) lags behind TripAdvisor (4.74★) and Playa Grande (4.58★). Food quality complaints skew Rohrmoser down.
Action: Conduct Rohrmoser-specific menu quality review. Check ingredient freshness protocols. Retrain kitchen on presentation standards.

Insight: HealthyFresh is top-rated theme (4.83★, 83 mentions) — customers love the healthy positioning. Underutilized in marketing.
Action: Feature "fresh & healthy" messaging prominently on Instagram. Create story highlights for ingredient sourcing and preparation.

Insight: RepeatVisit theme averages 4.67★ (67 mentions) — strong loyalty signal. But no formal loyalty program exists.
Action: Launch a loyalty stamp card or app-based rewards. "10th bowl free" or similar simple program to capture repeat visitors.

Insight: Gift Store mentions average 4.86★ (28 mentions) — highest rated touchpoint. Customers love it but it's rarely mentioned.
Action: Feature the gift store more on Instagram. Create gift bundles. Promote as a gifting destination for the holidays.

Insight: Playa Grande Atmosphere scores 4.84★ — the strongest differentiator. Tourists specifically praise the beach/town vibe.
Action: Amplify Playa Grande atmosphere in content. Use for brand videos. Promote as a destination experience, not just a meal stop.

Insight: Allergy incidents (7 mentions, 3.71★) are low volume but high-risk. Each incident can go viral and damage brand trust.
Action: Implement strict allergen labeling. Train all staff on top 8 allergens. Add allergen filter to digital menu.

Insight: 3,299 Instagram comments collected. Giveaway posts drive 10x comments. Community engagement is strong but inconsistent.
Action: Run 1 giveaway per quarter minimum. Respond to comments within 24h. Use comment themes to identify product demand signals.
